---
title: "Licenses"
---

## Local Instructional Material

This local course contains both UoN-authored material and material adapted from Software Carpentry.

Unless otherwise noted, the locally maintained instructional material in this course is made available under the [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International license][cc-by-human].

You are free:

- to **share** the material in any medium or format
- to **adapt** the material for your own teaching or reuse

for any purpose, even commercially.

You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate whether changes were made.

## Adapted Source Material

This course is substantially based on Software Carpentry's `python-novice-inflammation` lesson.

Original lesson material and associated code are distributed under the terms used by The Carpentries and the upstream lesson repository.

- Upstream lesson repository: <https://github.com/swcarpentry/python-novice-inflammation>
- Upstream lesson license: <https://github.com/swcarpentry/python-novice-inflammation/blob/main/LICENSE.md>

To keep the local course compatible with the source lesson, local instructional adaptations are also shared under CC BY 4.0 unless otherwise noted.

## Local Code and Software

Unless otherwise noted, local example code, scripts, and software in this course are made available under the [MIT license][mit-license].

## Attribution and Trademarks

If you reuse this course, retain attribution to both the UoN Digital Skills programme and the original Software Carpentry lesson where relevant.

`The Carpentries` and `Software Carpentry` are trademarks of their respective owners.

## No Warranty

Course materials are provided as-is, without warranty of any kind.

[cc-by-human]: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
[mit-license]: https://opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html
